findings.line: Sylvanas knew it before the priest beside him did.
findings.deletionTest: Sylvanas knew it before the priest beside him did. -> delete; 'He was dead. The corpse hung too slack.' carries the beat cleanly.

findings.issue: generic beat; could belong to any character and adds no character-specific physical work
generic reaction beat; interchangeable and already implied by the exchange
generic reaction beat; the dialogue already carries the tension

findings.line: The closer they came to the southern field tents, the cleaner the motion became.
findings.povMismatch: Sylvanas can read efficiency, but 'cleaner the motion' abstracts the visible carrier into a scene-state label from outside the body.

findings.line: He was already measuring distance, horseflesh, road width, which officers could move without sleep, how many bodies could disappear into a city that size before anyone understood the count.
findings.povMismatch: This crosses into Arthas's internal calculations, which the chapter plan explicitly forbids; Sylvanas can watch him assess the map but not narrate the contents of his head.

findings.line: It is the truth you have time for.
findings.missingPayload: the actionable claim that the Stratholme routes are already live
findings.reason: Placeholder noun stand-in; the line sounds hard without naming the actual report.
findings.suggestedFix: It means the routes are already live.

findings.line: There may still be a narrow answer,
findings.failedQuestion: What does this cash out to?
findings.missingPayload: the one remaining chance to hit the grain before the city fully turns
findings.reason: Placeholder-noun stand-in; 'answer' hides the actual proposed move.
findings.suggestedFix: There may still be one shot at the grain,

findings.line: I might blunt the next turn.
findings.missingPayload: the next wave of plague spread inside the city
findings.reason: Abstract stand-in; 'next turn' asks the reader to supply the concrete consequence.
findings.suggestedFix: I might keep the next wave from starting.

findings.line: If it succeeds, you arrive at a city with one door still open.
findings.missingPayload: the remaining chance to reach Stratholme before the grain finishes spreading
findings.reason: Placeholder image; 'one door' simulates precision without naming the surviving opening.
findings.suggestedFix: If it succeeds, you arrive before the grain reaches every quarter.

findings.line: Ride with her and buy the attempt everything it can be bought.
findings.failedQuestion: What does this cash out to?
findings.missingPayload: time and road-clearance for Jaina's run
findings.reason: Tactical-prestige compression; it sounds commanding without naming the concrete asset being bought.
findings.suggestedFix: Ride with her and buy the attempt every minute you can.

findings.missingPayload: a plain, unsugared report if Stratholme is already lost
findings.reason: Sloganized abstraction in dialogue; the fragment hides the concrete instruction behind gravitas.

summary.verdictReason: Pass B found 12 kills in v2-r4.md, including 1 moderate narrator-seep hit and 11 additional mild kills; the chapter remains over the fail threshold.
